heading: Internet browsers built into telephones used with public mobile services
label: 619 Internet browsers built into telephones used with public mobile services
notes: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–260, title I, § 104(b)124 Stat. 2761Oct. 8, 2010“Section 718 of the Communications Act of 1934 [], as added by subsection (a), shall take effect 3 years after the date of enactment of this Act [].”47 U.S.C. 619Oct. 8, 2010
amendments: Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 111–260, title I, § 104(b)124 Stat. 2761Oct. 8, 2010“Section 718 of the Communications Act of 1934 [], as added by subsection (a), shall take effect 3 years after the date of enactment of this Act [].”47 U.S.C. 619Oct. 8, 2010

children.text: to make accessible or usable any Internet browser other than a browser that such manufacturer or provider includes or arranges to include in the telephone; or

to make Internet content, applications, or services accessible or usable (other than enabling individuals with disabilities to use an included browser to access such content, applications, or services).

ensuring that the telephone or services that such manufacture or provider offers is accessible to and usable by individuals with disabilities without the use of third party applications, peripheral devices, software, hardware, or customer premises equipment; or

using third party applications, peripheral devices, software, hardware, or customer premises equipment that is available to the consumer at nominal cost and that individuals with disabilities can access.
